drop_status.text: สถานะการเปลี่ยนแปลง
drop_status.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

combo.dep_code: 01=หุ้นหนี้/02=บริหาร/03=ติดตามหนี้/04=สินเชื่อ
combo.drop_status_chg: 0=-/1=งดทั้งหมด/2=งดต้น/3=งดดอก/4=ปกติ เปลี่ยนแปลง

root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over( partition by (drop_status) order by tab.drop_status ,tab.document_no , tab.membership_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.membership_no, (CASE lag(sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status , sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.document_no , sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.membership_no ) WHEN sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.membership_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as memname, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as sysdate_tdate, sc_mem_m_chang_request.dep_code, ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_change_payment.description_detail from sc_mem_m_ucf_change_payment where reason_code = sc_mem_m_chang_request.reason_code ) as description_detail, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.document_no, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.loan_contract, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.pricipal, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.balance, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_old, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.installment_old, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_compomise, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status, ( case sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status when '0' then '-' when '1' then 'งดทั้งหมด' when '2' then 'งดต้น' when '3' then 'งดดอก' when '4' then 'ปกติ/เปลี่ยนแปลง' end ) as drop_status_name, sc_mem_m_chang_request.effactive_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_chang_request.spare_begin , 'dd/mm/yyyy' ) as spare_begin, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_chang_request.spare_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy' ) as spare_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy' ) as operate_date, sc_mem_m_chang_request.remark, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve, '!report_header01!' as report_header01, '!report_header02!' as report_header02, '!report_footer01!' as report_footer01, '!report_footer02!' as report_footer02, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.installment_new , sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.code_put , sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.code_put_old, (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name, (select assit_manager from sc_cnt_m_coop) as assit_manager , (select user_name from si_security_user where user_id = sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_id) as user_name
FROM sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_member_work_info, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_chang_request
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.cancel_status = '0' ) and ( sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status not in ('0') ) and sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status = '1' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date = '18/03/2021' --and sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.membership_no = '001826' --and ( sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status ='4' ) order by sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.document_no ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.membership_no )tab
